title: Adult Human Kidney Tissue Cell Dissociation on Ice
author: Andrew Potter
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.q6cdzaw

steps.title: Mince biopsy into 1-mm3 pieces using...
steps.instruction: Mince biopsy into 1-mm3 pieces using razor blade on petri dish on ice.

steps.title: Weigh out 10 mg of minced kidney onto petri dish
steps.instruction: Weigh out 10 mg of minced kidney onto petri dish. Transfer to 1.5 mL tube with 1 mL of enzyme mix on ice.

steps.title: Shake tube every 1 min
steps.instruction: Shake tube every 1 min. Triturate 10x every 3 min (starting at 2 min), using p1000 set to 700 µL with the end of the tip cut off. 00:03:00, triturate 10X 00:01:00, shake

steps.title: After 30 min of incubating on...
steps.instruction: After 30 min of incubating on ice, let tissue chunks settle on ice 1 min. 00:30:00, incubate on ice

steps.title: Transfer flow-through to 15 mL conical
steps.instruction: Transfer flow-through to 15 mL conical. Bring volume to 10 mL with ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%

steps.title: Add additional 1 mL enzyme mix...
steps.instruction: Add additional 1 mL enzyme mix to tube containing tissue chunks. Continue triturating 10x every 3 min and shaking every min while incubating on ice. undetermined, add enzyme mix to tissue chunks 00:03:00, triturate 10X 00:01:00, shake

steps.title: After 50 min additional time (1 hr
steps.instruction: After 50 min additional time (1 hr. 20 min total) triturate 10x and transfer entire volume of digest mix to a new 30 µM filter on a 50 mL conical tube. Rinse filter w/5 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. 00:50:00, incubate on ice w/trituration undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%

steps.title: Transfer flow-through to 15 mL conical
steps.instruction: Transfer flow-through to 15 mL conical. Bring volume to 10 mL with ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. Spin this tube and the tube from previous layer (two tubes) 650 g for 5 min at 4 °C. Remove supernatant. undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04% Undetermined, spin 650 g for 5 min

steps.title: Add 2 mL of RBC lysis...
steps.instruction: Add 2 mL of RBC lysis buffer to the tubes and combine to one 15 mL conical. Triturate 20X using 1 mL pipet. Let sit three min on ice. Add 10 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04% to dilute RBC lysis buffer. undetermined, RBC lysis buffer undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%

steps.title: Spin 650 g for 5 min at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Spin 650 g for 5 min at 4 °C. Remove all but 100 µL of supernatant.

steps.title: Re-suspend in ~100 µL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0
steps.instruction: Re-suspend in ~100 µL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. Check viability and concentration using hemocytometer with trypan blue.

steps.title: Remove 80% of supernatant (consisting of...
steps.instruction: Remove 80% of supernatant (consisting of released cells) and apply to 30 µM filter on 50 mL conical. Rinse filter with 5 mL ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04% undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%

steps.title: Spin flow-through 650 g for 5 min at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Spin flow-through 650 g for 5 min at 4 °C. Remove supernatant. Re-suspend cells in 10 mL PBS/BSA 0.04% and leave on ice. Undetermined, spin 650 g for 5 min undetermined, re-suspend cells in ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%

steps.title: To 100 µL of cells, repeat RBC lysis
steps.instruction: To 100 µL of cells, repeat RBC lysis: add 900 µL of RBC lysis buffer. Triturate 10x and let sit one min. on ice. Add 10 mL of ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04%. Spin 650 g for 5 min at 4 ºC. Remove as much supernatant as possible. undetermined, RBC lysis buffer undetermined, ice-cold PBS/BSA 0.04% Undetermined, Spin 650 g for 5 min
